zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich VI. von Kleve於大約1185年出生在可列福時，他的父親Dietrich V. von Kleve23歲，母親Margaretha van Holland22歲。他和Hedwig von Meißen至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1260年5月13日在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在可列福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dietrich VI. von Kleve于大约1185年出生在可列福时，他的父亲Dietrich V. von Kleve23岁，母亲Margaretha van Holland22岁。他和Hedwig von Meißen至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1260年5月13日在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在可列福。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
German: variant of   Klever   2.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

variants.name: Cleve
meanings: English: variant of   Cliff  .
German: variant of   Kleve  .

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from þeud ‘people’ + rīc ‘power’. See Terry .

variants.name: Diederick
meanings: from þeud ‘people’ + rīc ‘power’. See Terry .

nameMeanings.name: VI.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich VI. von Kleve was born about 1185, in Cleves, his father, Dietrich V. von Kleve, was 23 and his mother, Margaretha van Holland, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Hedwig von Meißen. He died on 13 May 1260, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Cleves.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich VI. von Kleve est né environ 1185, à Kleve, son père, Dietrich V. von Kleve, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaretha van Holland, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Hedwig von Meißen. Il est décédé le 13 mai 1260, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Kleve.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dietrich VI. von Kleve um 1185 in Kleve geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich V. von Kleve 23 und seine Mutter Margaretha van Holland 22. Er hatte mit Hedwig von Meißen mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Mai 1260 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kleve begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich VI. von Kleve è nato il circa 1185 nel Kleve, il suo padre, Dietrich V. von Kleve, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaretha van Holland, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Hedwig von Meißen. Morì il 13 maggio 1260, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Kleve.

ja.lifeSummary: Dietrich VI. von Kleveが約1185年にクレブで生まれた時，父Dietrich V. von Kleveは23歳，母Margaretha van Hollandは22歳であった。彼はHedwig von Meißenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1260年5月13日に故郷で76歳で死去し，クレブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich VI. von Kleve(이)가 대략 1185년 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich V. von Kleve(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaretha van Holland(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Hedwig von Meißen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1260년 5월 13일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 클브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich VI. von Kleve nasceu aproximadamente 1185, em Kleve, seu pai, Dietrich V. von Kleve, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha van Holland, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Hedwig von Meißen. Ele faleceu em 13 de maio de 1260, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Kleve.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich VI. von Kleve родился около 1185 г. в местности клив, его отцу по имени Dietrich V. von Kleve было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaretha van Holland, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Hedwig von Meißen. Он умер 13 мая 1260 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности клив.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dietrich VI. von Kleve nació aproximadamente 1185, en Kleve, su papá, Dietrich V. von Kleve, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaretha van Holland, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Hedwig von Meißen. Murió el 13 de mayo de 1260, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Kleve.
